problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: The key to What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? is Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area — specifically Transcranial magnetic stimulation — which would help 75,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
